articles.title: Crypto liquidations reach $470M as Bitcoin retraces, altcoins surge
articles.description: Dogecoin, XRP, Stellar and Sandbox saw a larger liquidation share than usual as some top altcoins from the 2020-2021 cycle soared as high as 50%.
